title: ULTRAKILL feedbacker shield +parry sounds
description: Remodeled shield to the left arm from a V1 skin, changes block sounds to parry sounds
body:
If you ever thought blocking with a shield is boring, this mod changes that!
Satisfying boosts of dopamine every block.

Changes shield model to the feedbacker arm from ULTRAKILL, optionally adds parry sounds replacing block sounds.

Versions:
- 1.0A - feedbacker with sound
- 1.0B - feedbacker without sound


Credits:

ULTRAKILL - sounds, and arm idea

EvelynShadelynz - original minecraft skin: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/v-1-ultrakill/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/v-1-ultrakill/)

![feedbacker arm in minecraft, clickbait arrow point at stretched V1 plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6834c9bd5483bf81449307cb16eed966e4dd0645.png)
